overview.summary: Model score 3 vs user score 4 (gap -1). Primary drivers: Location Stability, Environmental Noise / Speech, Motion / Restlessness. Agreement classification: USER_HIGHER.

result.why_difference: Model relied more heavily on objective sensor stability, while user-reported distraction tolerance was lower than inferred.

prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.audio: Audio signal quality was adequate. Improve policy by up-weighting persistent >60 dBA exposure in cognitively demanding sessions.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.vitals: Physiological indicators should be used as supporting evidence, not a dominant signal, when environmental noise is primary.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.motion: Motion context should stabilize interpretation, not override adverse audio conditions.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.gps: Use GPS consistency to support motion interpretation while preserving audio-first weighting for environmental factors.

judgment_policy_next_run: Apply stronger session-specific context weighting over historical baseline anchoring.
Preserve GPS as secondary evidence and prevent direct score inflation from location stability.
